texto: Who we are’ and ‘what is our own’ that we have to understand
autor: it is not something we have to tell others.
explicacao: Orientação direta de it is not something we have to tell others. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Who we are’ and ‘what is our own’ that we have to understand” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, dada-bhagwan, understand, útil em momentos de reflexao.
